flavorText: Draconic sorcerers inherit ancient dragon magic manifesting in resilience, elemental might, and wings.

features.description: Choose your draconic ancestry, determining an associated damage type and granting the dragon language.
Your hit point maximum increases by 1 per sorcerer level, and while unarmored your AC equals 13 + Dexterity modifier.
Add your Charisma modifier to one damage roll of spells matching your ancestry damage type. You can spend 1 Sorcery Point to gain resistance to that type for 1 hour.
You sprout draconic wings and gain a 60-foot flying speed.
Once per long rest, emit a 60-foot aura that forces creatures to make Wisdom saves or become charmed or frightened by you.

draconic-dragon-ancestor.summary: Your bloodline ties your magic to a draconic heritage that shapes damage flavor, personality, and magical identity.
draconic-dragon-ancestor.description: Dragon Ancestor is the fantasy anchor for the subclass. It tells the player what kind of dragon legacy they carry and what emotional or elemental tone their magic should have.

draconic-resilience.summary: Your body and magic carry the hardiness of dragonkind, making you tougher than most sorcerers.
draconic-resilience.description: Draconic Resilience is why this subclass often feels more comfortable nearer the fight. It changes survivability in a way players should notice immediately.

draconic-elemental-affinity.summary: Your chosen element becomes a sharper extension of your bloodline, rewarding spells that match your dragon heritage.
draconic-elemental-affinity.description: Elemental Affinity is the damage identity spike for draconic sorcerers. It should make matching-element spells feel especially satisfying and on-theme.

draconic-dragon-wings.summary: Your lineage manifests physically, granting the mobility and presence of true dragon blood.
draconic-dragon-wings.description: Dragon Wings is one of the subclass’s most visible fantasy moments. It turns the bloodline from a story into something everyone at the table can see.

draconic-presence.summary: Unleash the overwhelming majesty of dragonkind to dominate the emotional space of the fight.
draconic-presence.description: Draconic Presence is a dramatic control feature. It should feel like the room remembering that dragons are apex beings and your blood remembers it too.
